SEARCH
Package com.example.eventsapp

Class AdminUserEventAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder>
com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter
public class AdminUserEventAdapter extends androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder>
RecyclerView adapter that lists events belonging to a specific user in the admin user-detail screen. Each row shows the event name and date; tapping a row opens the event details via AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
    Callback invoked when an admin taps an event row in the user-detail screen.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdminUserEventAdapter

      public AdminUserEventAdapter(List<Event> events, AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener listener)
      Constructs an AdminUserEventAdapter.
      Parameters:
      events - The list of Event objects to display.
      listener - Callback invoked when an event row is tapped; must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • onCreateViewHolder

      @NonNull public com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull android.view.ViewGroup parent, int viewType)
      Inflates the event-row layout and wraps it in a AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder.
      Specified by:
      onCreateViewHolder in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder>
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent ViewGroup into which the new view will be added.
      viewType - The view type of the new view (unused; only one type exists).
      Returns:
      A new AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder backed by the inflated row view.

    • onBindViewHolder

      public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder holder, int position)
      Binds event data to the provided AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder. Displays the event name and formatted date, and attaches a click listener that delegates to AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener.
      Specified by:
      onBindViewHolder in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder>
      Parameters:
      holder - The ViewHolder to update.
      position - The position of the item within the data set.

    • getItemCount

      public int getItemCount()
      Returns the total number of events managed by this adapter.
      Specified by:
      getItemCount in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter.ViewHolder>
      Returns:
      The size of the events list.
